title: EncroChat extraction continuity and cropped-message trap
offenceWording: Being concerned in the supply of Class A drugs
mainIssue: Only cropped message images are served; the app must chase the full export and continuity before summarising meaning.
uncertainEvidence: whether screenshots are complete, edited, or selected
expectedTodayIssue: The case is provisional because screenshots are served but the full extraction and metadata are not safely before the defence.
expectedSummaryRisk: Screenshot-only evidence should be described as incomplete source material, not as the full communication record.
polishOnlyWarnings: may need grouping of screenshot and extraction chase items
